app.name: TokenTracker
app.one_liner: A local-first, zero-config tool that auto-collects token usage from 12+ AI coding tools, provides cost analytics via a local dashboard, and enables one-click skill synchronization across agents.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display real-time token usage trends, model breakdowns, and cost analysis for all connected AI tools in a privacy-preserving local interface.
primary_actions: Access local analytics without API keys
Install and sync skills across agents
View usage trends by model and tool

rust_commands.name: save_item
rust_commands.purpose: Persist token usage records or skill metadata locally without requiring network calls.

mvp_plan: week 1: Build local SQLite ingestion pipeline
week 1: Implement auto-detection of 12+ AI tool hooks
week 1: Launch minimal dashboard at localhost:7680
acceptance_tests: Dashboard loads at localhost:7680 on first run without manual configuration
No crashes occur during macOS menu bar app initialization
Skills can be installed once and synced to Claude, Codex, and Gemini agents
Token usage from Codex and Cursor appears with correct model attribution
